wiki.industry: chemical industry, pharmaceutical industry, manufacture of pharmaceutical preparations
wiki.keyPeople: Friedrich Jacob Merck, Heinrich Emanuel Merck, Carl Merck, Wilhelm Merck, Georg Merck
wiki.controversies:
== Controversies ==
Merck KGaA has faced criticism for continuing its business operations in Russia following the country's invasion of Ukraine. Despite international sanctions and pressure on companies to exit the Russian market, Merck KGaA has maintained its presence, citing commitments to supplying essential medicines. This decision has sparked backlash from activists and organizations advocating for corporate responsibility in geopolitical conflicts.
wiki.extract: The Merck Group, branded and commonly known as Merck, is a German multinational science and technology company headquartered in Darmstadt, with about 60,000 employees and a presence in 66 countries. The group includes around 250 companies; the main company is Merck KGaA in Germany. The company is divided into three business lines: Healthcare, Life Sciences and Electronics. Merck was founded in 1668 and is the world's oldest operating chemical and pharmaceutical company, as well as one of the largest pharmaceutical companies globally.

sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was assembling small canisters when they fell and struck the back of their head on the floor. They sustained head lacerations.

sampleRecords.event_description: Injured by slipping or swinging object held by injured worker
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was preparing to disassemble equipment for cleaning by using a metal pick when the pick slipped and punctured the employee's left index finger, resulting in hospitalization.
An employee was lifting a jug when they sustained a lower back injury.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slipping
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee slipped on the floor in a kitchenette and suffered a knee injury.

sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by object falling from vehicle or machinery-other than vehicle part
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was inspecting the door to a interior idle tray dryer when the door fell off the hinges and onto his foot.

topHazards.label: The bottle cap can be cracked which can cause the child-resistant closure to become ineffective to young children who can gain unintended access to the capsule…

sampleRecalls.title: Merck Recalls Temodar and Temozolomide Bottles with Cracked Caps Due to Failure to Meet Child-Resistant Closure Requirement
sampleRecalls.description: This recall to replace involves bottle caps for Temodar and Temozolomide (generic) capsules, an oral chemotherapy drug. The capsules were distributed in 5- and 14-count brown glass bottles that have white plastic child-resistant caps. A white label affixed to the bottle has the word "Temozolomide" printed in black let…
hazards: The bottle cap can be cracked which can cause the child-resistant closure to become ineffective to young children who can gain unintended access to the capsule…
products: Bottles with cracked caps containing Temodar® (Temozolomide) and Temozolomide (generic) capsules
